closed_form_equation_v88.feature_term: K_f_v88 = K_f_v87 + K_f_v87 * S_zone_score * 0.004 + K_f_v87 * B_plastic_v32 * 0.001 + K_f_v87 * D_feature_v26 * 0.001
closed_form_equation_v88.structure_term: K_s_v88 = K_s_v87 + K_s_v87 * S_zone * 0.007 + K_s_v87 * B_struct_v32 * 0.004 + K_s_v87 * D_structure_v26 * 0.002
closed_form_equation_v88.learning_term: K_l_v88 = K_l_v87 + K_l_v87 * R_train_v32 + M_zone * 1000 + S_zone_score * 1000 + M_brain_direct_v26 * 1000

project_readout.summary: v88 checks whether the low-risk steady zone starts turning into a more explicit systemic low-risk steady regime.
project_readout.next_question: next push this core into larger and longer systems to see whether the low-risk zone expands instead of flattening.
